changelog: NEW: 72-hour free trial. Anyone who signs in with a new Xtream account gets full app access for 72 hours before the paywall appears. The trial is anchored to your Xtream username (server-side), so reinstalling or switching devices won't reset the clock — one trial per account.
A small 'FREE TRIAL · 2d 4h' pill in the top-right corner shows your remaining time. The pill turns red and pulses gently when less than 6 hours remain.
Existing paid users see no change — the trial only applies to never-seen-before Xtream accounts.
